demographic_context.districts_used: EAST KHASI HILLS→West Khasi Hills; WEST KHASI HILLS→West Khasi Hills; EAST GARO HILLS→East Garo Hills; WEST GARO HILLS→West Garo Hills; RIBHOI→Ribhoi (NFHS-4 proxy); SOUTH GARO HILLS→South Garo Hills

existing_analysis.generated_baseline_summary: Shillong flipped from INC to VOTPP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -9.8 points and INC vote share changed by -34.3 points compared with 2019. The 2024 margin was 35.8%. This is a descriptive election profile, not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.generated_electoral_movement: Available data indicates Shillong flipped from INC to VOTPP between 2019 and 2024. BJP vote share changed by -9.8 percentage points versus 2019. INC vote share changed by -34.3 percentage points versus 2019. The winning margin moved from 19.4% in 2019 to 35.8% in 2024. Turnout changed by +5.7 percentage points between 2019 and 2024. This section describes observed election movement only and is not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.generated_demographic_context: Electricity/Lpg/Mobile Phone/Bank Account access indicators are available for this seat. Available data indicates relatively high district-linked demographic coverage for this seat.
existing_analysis.generated_district_context: District mapping uses: EAST KHASI HILLS→West Khasi Hills; WEST KHASI HILLS→West Khasi Hills; EAST GARO HILLS→East Garo Hills; WEST GARO HILLS→West Garo Hills; RIBHOI→Ribhoi (NFHS-4 proxy); SOUTH GARO HILLS→South Garo Hills. Some districts are not mapped: JAINTIA HILLS. NFHS-5 coverage share is about 96.8%. Change-indicator coverage share is about 96.8%. Change quality flag: low.
existing_analysis.generated_what_to_watch: Monitor whether the 2024 seat change stabilizes in future cycles. Turnout shifted materially between 2019 and 2024 and may be worth tracking. Incomplete district mapping may limit future demographic interpretation for this seat.
existing_analysis.final_summary: Shillong flipped from INC to VOTPP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -9.8 points and INC vote share changed by -34.3 points compared with 2019. The 2024 margin was 35.8%. This is a descriptive election profile, not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.final_electoral_movement: Available data indicates Shillong flipped from INC to VOTPP between 2019 and 2024. BJP vote share changed by -9.8 percentage points versus 2019. INC vote share changed by -34.3 percentage points versus 2019. The winning margin moved from 19.4% in 2019 to 35.8% in 2024. Turnout changed by +5.7 percentage points between 2019 and 2024. This section describes observed election movement only and is not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.final_what_to_watch: Monitor whether the 2024 seat change stabilizes in future cycles. Turnout shifted materially between 2019 and 2024 and may be worth tracking. Incomplete district mapping may limit future demographic interpretation for this seat.

writing_prompts.what_happened_prompt: Describe observed 2019→2024 election movement for Shillong, Meghalaya using winner, vote-share, margin, and turnout fields only.
writing_prompts.why_it_mattered_prompt: Explain why Shillong may be analytically useful using priority reason (seat_flip;top_inc_loss), contest closeness, swings, and state context.
writing_prompts.factors_prompt: List only cautious factors such as candidate profile, alliance arithmetic, state-level swing, turnout movement, or limited demographic coverage.
writing_prompts.demographic_prompt: Summarise available NFHS-linked indicators and district mapping. If unavailable, state that the profile remains election-only.
writing_prompts.what_to_watch_prompt: Use forward-looking but non-predictive language about seat stability, swing consolidation, and coverage improvements.
writing_prompts.caveat_prompt: State that local causal explanations require further source review.
